# Code of Conduct

## Our Standards

Maschina is a professional engineering environment. We expect:

- Respectful, direct technical communication
- Constructive code review — critique code, not people
- Good faith engagement — assume competence and good intent
- Patience with contributors who are learning the codebase

We do not tolerate:

- Harassment, discrimination, or personal attacks
- Deliberately misleading or manipulative behaviour
- Publishing others' private information without consent

---

## Reporting

If you experience or witness unacceptable behaviour, contact the project owner at conduct@maschina.ai. All reports are handled confidentially.

---

## Enforcement

Violations may result in warnings, temporary bans, or permanent removal from the project, at the discretion of the maintainers.
